gate_note: overall_passed = sub_2.freq_consistency_passed ONLY (the normalization-invariant added-mass frequency-consistency check). sub_1 (symmetry/dimensional) and sub_3 (incompressible) are ADVISORY — recorded for Phase 5, do NOT gate. Phase 4 launch requires BOTH data/spike_0_6c/PASS AND data/spike_0_6d/PASS.
